text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: While I'm watching a race...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh, would you look at that...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Agh! The track's all muddy! It's<n>probably
because it rained super hard<n>yesterday...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
No way! They said it was going to be<n>in perfect
condition today!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, this sucks! Now my whole<n>running strategy
is ruined!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Heh, this is perfect! Everything's<n>just how I
expected!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hehe... haha! AHAHAHAHA!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, Air Shakur is laughing like<n>crazy. Has she
finally snapped?

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
She looks wild as ever... I hope she<n>doesn't get
herself kicked out.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um... H-hi, Shakur. Good luck today...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? Oh, Doto. You came to watch!<n>Hehehe.
Great weather today, huh?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Uh... Well, it seems pretty dreary out...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Exactly! Not too hot, and no sun in my<n>eyes!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
These are the perfect conditions for<n>me!
Hehehe...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: You're, um... in a really good mood<n>today.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Heheheh. Well, why wouldn't I be?<n>Everything
has fallen perfectly into<n>place!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
No doubt—today's my day. I'm gonna<n>win by a
landslide.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And I'm gonna start my spurt from<n>the very
back, so they all can see me<n>tear past 'em at the
last corner.<n>Hilarious, right?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
B-but the track is really bad today...<n>And it might
rain soon...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
All of that is within the margin of error.<n>There's
only one risk left to worry<n>about...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: W-what's that?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The risk that I'll get lost in the thrill<n>and go
completely wild out there!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
My adrenaline is pumping! Ah, I'm<n>gonna cut
loose today.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Look at all those idiots. Heh. They<n>don't even
consider me a threat!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eek?! Thunder?! Sh-Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Don't be afraid, Doto. All you need to<n>do is keep
your eyes on me!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... HAHAHA! I'm gonna show<n>them all!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: NOTHING beats my logic!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, Air Shakur crushes<n>the
competition and takes first place,<n>sending the
crowd into a frenzy.
